creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Created attachment 239596
Reformatted previous attachment as a patch

1. I have attached your change reformatted as a patch.
2. However, where is this xorg-server-21.1.6.tar.xz?  https://xorg.freedesktop.org/releases/individual/xserver/xorg-server-21.1.6.tar.xz exists, but is 4977496 bytes long instead of 4904196.  Same for the versions at various other mirrors.
3. Therefore, I haven't been able to compile and test.
